login.title: Haad
login.lead: Kateri doo ayóó nihá. Donor and Resident users can sign up directly. Staff and Admin accounts are created by an administrator.

twoFactor.requiresSetupNotice: Admin and Staff accounts must enable two-factor authentication. After you sign in with your password, you will be taken to Profile to finish setup.
twoFactor.successLead: Enter your 6-digit authenticator code, or a one-time recovery code (format XXXXX-XXXXX). Use this same field for both.
twoFactor.infoMessage: Yéʼ, diné naaznilgo: kin ílʼínígo naalkaah code nideiłkah.

errors.twoFactorFailed: Naaki factor verification doo yéʼ da.

signup.title: Akʼe ílʼínígo naalkaah
signup.lead: Atsʼí diné akʼe ílʼínígo naalkaah Donor doodaii Resident ílʼínígo. Staff doodaii Admin akʼe ílʼínígo naalkaah administrators ílʼínígo.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
Kateri personal data nideiłkah Diné bináʼ ílʼínígo. Kin ílʼínígo naalkaah, donation records, doodaii case information nideiłkah.

Data nideiłkah service delivery, safeguarding, recordkeeping, doodaii security ílʼínígo. Personal data doo yoołkah da. Access role-based permissions doodaii authenticated sessions ílʼínígo.

Data retention operational, legal, doodaii safeguarding requirements ílʼínígo. Retention periods doo yéʼ da, records deleted doodaii anonymized.

Access, correction, doodaii deletion nideiłkah personal data ílʼínígo. Support nideiłkah requests ílʼínígo.

Cookie doodaii consent details Cookie Policy ílʼínígo. Essential security cookies required protected areas ílʼínígo.

Last updated: April 2026.

cookiePolicy.heading: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.body:
Kateri essential cookies nideiłkah users signed in, account sessions protect, doodaii secure site behavior ílʼínígo. Cookies required authentication ílʼínígo doodaii disabled doo kin da.

Accept all cookies doodaii necessary cookies only. Necessary cookies login, session continuity, doodaii security controls support. Optional cookies accepted ílʼínígo.

Last updated: April 2026.

cookieBanner.messageBefore: Kateri essential cookies authentication doodaii security ílʼínígo nideiłkah. Details review kin

unauthorized.heading: Doo Baa Hózhǫ́
unauthorized.body: Dii página baa nínáhwiinígíí doo baa ahéhee da.

impact.heading: Nihí Bííghaʼ
impact.lead: Kateri bííghaʼ nitsáhákees diné yázhí dóó bitsílí baa nitsáhákees: diné baa nitsáhákees, ałhidadiidzą́, justice baa nitsáhákees, dóó azlą́ʼ baa nitsáhákees.

safety.title: Diné Baa Nitsáhákees
safety.description: Diné baa nitsáhákees azlą́ʼ ałhidadiidzą́ yee nitsáhákees. Kateri baa nitsáhákees diné yázhí baa nitsáhákees dóó azlą́ʼ baa nitsáhákees.

healing.title: Ałhidadiidzą́
healing.description: Diné baa nitsáhákees azlą́ʼ, ałhidadiidzą́ yee nitsáhákees. Nihí baa nitsáhákees ałhidadiidzą́, counseling, mentorship, dóó azlą́ʼ baa nitsáhákees.

justice.title: Justice
justice.description: Kateri doo ájíltą́ da bee naaltsoos ałhidadiilyéé baa nanitin. Asdzą́ yázhí kéé yee naaltsoos ałhidadiilyéé baa nanitin yee baa hózhǫ́ǫ́ da.

empowerment.title: Nitsékees Bee Hózhǫ́
empowerment.description: Nihintah yee asdzą́ yázhí baa hózhǫ́ǫ́ doo yee nitsékees bee hózhǫ́ bee nanitin yee baa hózhǫ́ǫ́ da, ałhidadiilyéé, diné bizaad, bee nitsékees bee hózhǫ́ǫ́ da.

safehouse.heading: Diné Hózhǫ́ Bee Naaghá
safehouse.lead: Diné Hózhǫ́ Bee Naaghá kin yee' at'é. Łigaii, choo'í, 'akǫ́ǫ́, awéé'ígíí baa naaghá, łahgo naaghá bee naaghá yee at'é. Naaghá bee yilwoł, píłt'a'í bee yilwoł dóó yilwoł.
safehouse.noWebgl: Níhí browser dah yilwoł dóó 3D model dah yilwoł. Atsá browser yee at'é desktop dóó mobile bee.
safehouse.summaryAria: Diné Hózhǫ́ Bee Naaghá yee at'é
safehouse.insideHeading: Diné Hózhǫ́ Bee Naaghá yee at'é
safehouse.insideBody: Diné Hózhǫ́ Bee Naaghá kin yee at'é 10 łigaii, 2 choo'í baa naaghá, 5 choo'í, naaghá bee naaghá, 'akǫ́ǫ́, awéé'ígíí baa naaghá, łahgo naaghá bee naaghá yee at'é. Kin yee at'é yee naaghá dóó hózhǫ́ bee naaghá.

profile.updateLead: Ádahodiiłtin ła Kateri baa akohgo nanitin dóo naa'ídí bee hane'é.
profile.updateLeadShort: Ádahodiiłtin ła Kateri baa akohgo nanitin dóo naa'ídí bee hane'é.
profile.informationLead: Ádahodiiłtin ła díí awéé'é dóo app dóó akohgo nanitin baa ádahodiiłtin. Nitsili dóo azlíí ła naa'ídí bee hane'é yee ádahodiiłtin dóo t'áá akohgo ádahodiiłtin da.
profile.savedFull: Ádahodiiłtin dóo akohgo nanitin bee hane'é ádahodiiłtin.

donorDashboard.donateGoodsLead: Haálá ádahodiiłnii baa nahwiiniya. Fields match our in-kind data: category, quantity, unit, total estimated value, intended use, and condition. Value currency is the same as in the monetary section above
